title: Candidates to replace MTG talk Iran strikes. 'If I were in Congress'
shortDescription: There is still a crowded field fighting to replace Marjorie Taylor Greene in Georgia's 14th House district. Here's what they said about Iran.

title: Here's how Trump attacked Iran without Congress approval
shortDescription: President Trump didn't seek Congress' approval before the U.S. carried out military strikes against Iran on Saturday, Feb. 28. Here's how and why.

title: Early primaries test Trump’s influence and party loyalty | The Excerpt
shortDescription: Trump isn’t on the ballot, but his influence is everywhere. What early primaries reveal about party divisions and the battle for Congress in 2026.

title: 'Disgusting and evil.' Will Trump face MAGA backlash on Iran?
shortDescription: Trump campaigned as a staunch critic of previous U.S. wars in the Middle East, and some in his MAGA coalition aren't happy about the Iran operation.

title: Trump warns more US troop deaths 'likely'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump confirmed the deaths of three U.S. soldiers in Iran, warning that there "likely would be more."

title: Trump talks up results of Iran strikes
shortDescription: President Donald Trump said on Truth Social that U.S. and Israeli strikes sank Iranian ships and killed dozens of leaders.

title: Trump says conflict in Iran is moving in 'a very positive way'
shortDescription: President Donald Trump expressed optimism about the progress of the U.S. military operation in Iran online and in interviews on Sunday, March 1.

title: Trump warns 'more' US combat deaths before conflict ends. Iran updates
shortDescription: Iran's surviving leaders “want to talk, and I have agreed to talk," President Donald Trump told The Atlantic in a Sunday interview.
